title: triorchis spiralis
intro: Triorchis spiralis, also known as the spiral-twisted orchid or spiral-twisted orchid root, is a type of plant that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, the roots of Triorchis spiralis have been used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Triorchis spiralis are said to include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and colds, and treating various gastrointestinal issues. Triorchis spiralis is typically prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for consumption, although its use as a medicinal plant is not widely recognized by modern medicine.
